headline: Fair Isaac (FICO) And Why New FICO Score 10T Data Could Matter
summary: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac have released expanded historical loan datasets for FICO Score 10T. The datasets cover real-world mortgage performance under the next-generation FICO scoring model. This move represents a key step in modernizing credit scoring for the US mortgage market. For Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO), the expanded datasets from Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac put its FICO Score 10T model more squarely in focus for lenders, investors, and regulators. The company is best known for its...

headline: Fair Isaac (FICO) Stock May Be 24% Undervalued After Mortgage Rule Change
summary: Fair Isaac stock has more than doubled over the past five years, yet its current valuation sends mixed signals, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to upside while traditional market multiples suggest the shares are on the expensive side. Fair Isaac has delivered a 131.4% return over five years, which puts longer term shareholders in a strong position and raises the bar for what future returns would need to justify today’s price. Regulatory changes that open...

headline: What’s Fueling Street’s Confidence in Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO)
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is among the most profitable software stocks to buy right now. On June 9, Clear Street lifted the price target on Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) to $1,625 from $1,617 and reiterated a Buy rating. As highlighted by the analyst, the company’s $2 billion stock repurchase program represents 7% of total diluted […]
